description_long: This is a vintage accordion with a green, textured exterior and ornate white decorative patterns along the bellows and edges. The bellows are black with multiple visible folds, bordered by green panels that feature intricate white designs. One side of the accordion displays a set of white piano-style keys, while the opposite side has several rows of white buttons arranged in a grid. The metal grille panels on the ends are vented and show some signs of wear, including a torn section and a visible black strap. The instrument has a compact, boxy shape and appears to be constructed from a combination of metal, plastic, and fabric materials. A small emblem or badge is present above the keyboard, but the brand is not clearly identifiable.
description: A green, vintage accordion with ornate white patterns, black bellows, piano keys, and button controls. The exterior shows wear and features a torn strap and vented metal panels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green textured panel, vented metal grille, and a torn black strap.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the white piano keys and a small emblem above the keyboard.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the black bellows, ornate white patterns, and both the piano keys and button controls.
description_view_3: Rear view with the vented metal grille, torn section, and visible black strap.
